i.t-att-class: { 'code': 'fa-solid fa-code', 'object_create': 'fa-solid fa-square-plus', 'object_copy': 'fa-regular fa-clone', 'object_write': 'fa-solid fa-pencil', 'multi': 'fa-solid fa-list-ul', 'mail_post': 'fa-solid fa-envelope', 'followers': 'fa-solid fa-user', 'remove_followers': 'fa-solid fa-user-xmark', 'next_activity': 'fa-regular fa-clock', 'sms': 'fa-solid fa-mobile', 'webhook': 'fa-solid fa-paper-plane', 'whatsapp': 'fa-brands fa-whatsapp', }[action.data.state] || 'fa-regular fa-circle'
